cases.title: Generic AI legal answer used as binding legal action
cases.U: file, sign, or act on a binding legal decision
cases.correction: reduce the answer to general information or add jurisdiction-specific professional review
cases.trajectory_change: prevents a plausible answer from becoming an invalid legal action

cases.title: Single medical test treated as total diagnosis
cases.F: one laboratory value or one imaging result
cases.correction: restore full clinical context before treatment
cases.trajectory_change: prevents partial evidence from becoming total medical certainty

cases.title: Financial model used outside its validation distribution
cases.correction: restrict use, revalidate, stress-test, and monitor drift
cases.trajectory_change: prevents local statistical validity from becoming systemic financial exposure

cases.title: Simplified engineering formula used outside assumptions
cases.valid_scope: declared ideal or bounded operating assumptions
cases.correction: declare assumptions, test edge conditions, add safety factor
cases.trajectory_change: prevents calculation correctness from becoming structural failure

cases.title: School grade treated as total value of a student
cases.U: judge intelligence, future worth, or human potential
cases.valid_scope: limited measurement of performance under specific conditions
cases.correction: treat the grade as one indicator, not identity
cases.trajectory_change: prevents a metric from becoming a life-defining closure

cases.title: Political ideology treated as total explanation
cases.U: explain and decide all social problems
cases.correction: force multi-framework dependency audit before policy closure
cases.trajectory_change: prevents ideological reduction from becoming governance error

cases.title: Religious dogma treated as total cosmic explanation
cases.U: explain all existence and impose conduct
cases.valid_scope: symbolic, communal, ritual, or existential interpretation
cases.correction: distinguish symbolic use from total explanatory authority
cases.trajectory_change: prevents narrative closure from becoming absolute domination of meaning

cases.title: Bureaucratic rule treated as justice
cases.correction: add exception review and consequence audit
cases.trajectory_change: prevents procedural correctness from becoming structural injustice

cases.title: Single KPI treated as company truth
cases.F: one metric such as revenue, growth, or engagement
cases.correction: use KPI as local signal inside multi-dimensional audit
cases.trajectory_change: prevents metric optimization from damaging the actual system

cases.title: Single episode treated as total identity of a person
cases.F: one episode, sentence, mistake, or reaction
cases.correction: separate episode evidence from total identity judgment
cases.trajectory_change: prevents human relation from collapsing into fragmentary judgment

cases.title: Winner narrative treated as total history
cases.U: define collective memory and moral interpretation
cases.correction: reconstruct multi-perspective dependency field
cases.trajectory_change: prevents historical memory from becoming political closure

cases.title: Map used outside its valid scale
cases.correction: use a terrain/weather/navigation framework fit for the actual route
cases.trajectory_change: prevents map correctness from becoming route danger

cases.title: Dataset treated as reality
cases.valid_scope: inference over represented population under sampling assumptions
cases.correction: declare dataset scope and missing population before generalization
cases.trajectory_change: prevents data availability from masquerading as reality coverage

cases.title: Average treated as individual truth
cases.U: decide what is true for a specific individual
cases.correction: move from aggregate statistic to case-specific evaluation
cases.trajectory_change: prevents population signal from erasing individual reality

cases.title: Legal text treated as total justice
cases.correction: separate legality, interpretation, proportionality, and justice impact
cases.trajectory_change: prevents formal legal closure from becoming unjust outcome

cases.title: Intelligence fragment treated as strategy
cases.correction: treat intelligence as one input inside adversarial multi-factor analysis
cases.trajectory_change: prevents partial intelligence from becoming strategic disaster

cases.title: Economic growth treated as total social good
cases.correction: evaluate growth inside a wider dependency field
cases.trajectory_change: prevents output expansion from being mistaken for human improvement

cases.title: Algorithmic score treated as person
cases.U: access, punishment, employment, insurance, credit, or policing decision
cases.valid_scope: bounded probabilistic indicator under model assumptions
cases.correction: require explanation, contestability, human review, and scope limits
cases.trajectory_change: prevents model output from replacing human reality

cases.title: Scientific model treated as the object itself
cases.valid_scope: predictive or explanatory domain under assumptions
cases.correction: treat model as valid representation under scope, not the object itself
cases.trajectory_change: prevents scientific success from hardening into false ontology

cases.title: Reputation treated as truth
cases.U: judge reality, guilt, competence, or worth
cases.valid_scope: social signal of how others currently perceive x
cases.correction: separate reputation from evidence and direct verification
cases.trajectory_change: prevents collective perception from becoming truth

cases.title: News headline treated as complete event
cases.correction: delay judgment until context and dependencies are restored
cases.trajectory_change: prevents compression from becoming public misconception

cases.title: Emotion treated as total reality
cases.U: decide what is true or irreversible
cases.correction: use emotion as data, not as total verdict
cases.trajectory_change: prevents temporary state from becoming permanent decision

cases.title: Memory treated as recording
cases.correction: treat memory as evidence requiring corroboration
cases.trajectory_change: prevents personal certainty from becoming false historical closure

cases.title: Tradition treated as proof
cases.valid_scope: evidence of historical continuity and cultural meaning
cases.correction: separate continuity from validity
cases.trajectory_change: prevents inherited closure from blocking correction

cases.title: Technology treated as progress
cases.correction: evaluate deployment consequences, not only capability
cases.trajectory_change: prevents capability increase from being mistaken for civilizational improvement

cases.title: Market mechanism treated as total order
cases.correction: treat markets as one coordination framework inside institutional constraints
cases.trajectory_change: prevents economic mechanism from becoming total social philosophy

cases.title: Central plan treated as total order
cases.U: decide all allocation, production, and social coordination
cases.valid_scope: bounded coordination under available information and enforceable aims
cases.correction: restore feedback, plural mechanisms, and limits of central visibility
cases.trajectory_change: prevents planning abstraction from replacing living complexity

cases.title: Expert authority treated as total truth
cases.U: settle truth outside declared expertise or evidence
cases.valid_scope: specialized judgment within domain and evidence
cases.correction: use expertise as weighted input inside scope, not absolute closure
cases.trajectory_change: prevents authority from replacing validity

cases.title: Majority preference treated as truth or justice
cases.valid_scope: legitimate collective decision procedure under constitutional limits
cases.correction: separate procedural legitimacy from truth and justice validity
cases.trajectory_change: prevents procedure from becoming moral absolution

cases.title: External success treated as human value
cases.correction: separate measurable social outcome from human value
cases.trajectory_change: prevents civilization from confusing visibility with worth

cases.title: Punishment treated as solution
cases.valid_scope: deterrence, containment, accountability in bounded conditions
cases.correction: distinguish containment, accountability, prevention, and repair
cases.trajectory_change: prevents punitive closure from replacing structural prevention

cases.title: Symptom suppression treated as cure
cases.correction: separate relief from cure and track underlying dependencies
cases.trajectory_change: prevents temporary stabilization from being mistaken for resolution

cases.title: Formal correctness treated as system safety
cases.valid_scope: properties proven inside specified formal model
cases.correction: connect formal proof to system-level hazard analysis
cases.trajectory_change: prevents proof inside model from becoming false safety of the whole

cases.title: Label treated as essence
cases.correction: treat label as pointer, not essence
cases.trajectory_change: prevents naming from becoming ontological imprisonment

cases.title: Prediction treated as future
cases.U: act as if forecast is certain
cases.correction: convert prediction into scenario planning with confidence and contingencies
cases.trajectory_change: prevents probability from becoming fatalism

cases.title: Identity category treated as person
cases.correction: restore individual field beyond category membership
cases.trajectory_change: prevents category cognition from becoming prejudice

cases.title: Short-term optimization treated as long-term good
cases.correction: add temporal dependency and long-term stability audit
cases.trajectory_change: prevents local gain from producing global deterioration

cases.title: Representation in one base treated as the number itself
cases.F: one representation, base, notation, or projection
cases.U: claim total property of the object
cases.correction: compare across representations before claiming object-level property
cases.trajectory_change: prevents representational artifact from becoming false ontology

cases.title: LLM confident tone treated as truth
cases.correction: separate fluency from verification and scope
cases.trajectory_change: prevents plausible language from becoming false knowledge

cases.title: Local correctness treated as global stability
cases.valid_scope: behavior of component inside tested conditions
cases.correction: perform system-level interaction and stability audit
cases.trajectory_change: prevents correct parts from hiding fragile wholes

cases.title: City map used for city walk
cases.U: find a museum inside the mapped area
cases.correction: no correction needed beyond normal map-reading limits
cases.trajectory_change: shows that local closure is valid when use stays inside scope

cases.title: Rough estimate used only for brainstorming
cases.correction: no structural error if not used for commitment
cases.trajectory_change: shows that excluded dependencies are not errors unless critical for the actual use

cases.title: Formula used inside its assumptions
cases.correction: no correction needed while the use remains ideal and declared
cases.trajectory_change: shows that abstraction is legitimate inside declared scope

cases.title: Medical test used as partial indicator
cases.U: decide what further tests or questions are needed
cases.correction: no structural error if explicitly used only to guide further inquiry
cases.trajectory_change: shows that partial evidence is safe when kept partial

cases.title: LLM answer used as draft only
cases.U: generate a first draft for later verification
cases.correction: no structural error if not treated as verified output
cases.trajectory_change: shows that AI output is not invalid by nature; misuse creates the error
